title: I Take My Refuge in the LORD

verses.text: “Behold, the wicked bend their bows, and on the string they set their dart; from shadows dark they aim and shoot at those who are upright in heart.”
The lord is in his holy place; The Lord in heaven makes his throne. His eyes observe the human race, And in his sight each one is known.
The LORD examines all the just, the righteous ones he proves and tests, but those who treasure wickedness, who love the wrong, his soul detests.
For God the LORD is righteous still, in righteous ways he takes delight; and they alone will see his face who are in heart and deeds upright.
